events.text: Goal!  Germany 1, Ghana 0. Mario Götze (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Thomas Müller with a cross.
Goal!  Germany 1, Ghana 1. André Ayew (Ghana) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Harrison Afful with a cross.
Goal!  Germany 1, Ghana 2. Asamoah Gyan (Ghana) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Sulley Muntari with a through ball.
Goal!  Germany 2, Ghana 2. Miroslav Klose (Germany) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Benedikt Höwedes   following a corner.
Sulley Muntari (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
